title: Benefits and Services Assistance * Social Security Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Benefits and Services Assistance * Social Security Issues 4 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS SOCIAL SECURITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Facilitates face-to-face video conferences with Social Security. Assists with replacement cards, name changes, retirement, SSI, SSDI, and other concerns. 201 SE Swan Avenue Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Unrestricted; includes tribal members and the general public Hours: Thursdays 1pm-4pm Email (541) 444-8222 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS DISABILITIES COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides service coordination, educational information, and training for families, workplaces, and other agencies. Topics include, but are not limited to, Social Security, retirement benefits, survivor/widow benefits, adult and child disability benefits, senior and disability resources, home care worker information, and Social Security appeals assistance. 1233 Veterans Street Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Individuals with a disability or potential disability or disability that is going to affect them for 12 months or longer Hours: No standard hours (541) 553-1161 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THOMAS, COON, NEWTON & FROST SOCIAL SECURITY DISABILITY BENEFITS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Represents adults and children seeking social security disability benefits (SSI and SSD). Services include assisting individuals by preparing initial applications and function reports, handling appeals, representation at hearings, and representation in federal court appeals if necessary. 820 SW 2nd Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted; anyone seeking social security disability benefits Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 228-5222 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access primary medical care, case management, advocacy, outpatient drug and alcohol treatment, drug detox, mental health evaluation, counseling, SSI/SSDI assistance from a public benefits specialist, OHP application assistance, and transportation to appointments. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Walk in services: Monday-Friday 9:30am-noon Scheduled case management appointments: Monday-Friday 1pm-4:30pm Reception and phone assistance: Monday-Friday 9:30am-3pm Email (541) 342-1295 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS SOCIAL SECURITY ASSISTANCE CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS DISABILITIES COORDINATION THOMAS, COON, NEWTON & FROST SOCIAL SECURITY DISABILITY BENEFITS WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST
